name: Bubbly Berry Lattice Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Place large size (14 X 20") oven cooking bag on a large cookie sheet.
3. In a large bowl, coat the blueberries with 3 tablespoons flour.
4. Roll out pastry for the bottom crust and fit into the pan; sprinkle with 1 tablespoon sugar and remaining flour.
5. Pour in the blueberries, sprinkle with lemon juice and remaining sugar.
6. Dot with butter.
7. Add lattice top crust made with remaining pastry; slide pie into bag.
8. Close bag with nylon tie.
9. Make 6 half-inch slits in the top.
10. Bake for 1 hour or until syrup boils and crust is brown.
